name: Pistachio, Honey & Orange Blossom Ice Cream

ingredients.item:
200g (7oz) pistachio nut slivers, plus extra to decorate
150g (5½oz) caster sugar
600ml (20fl oz) full-fat milk
600ml (20fl oz) double cream
3 tbsp clear honey
200ml (1/3 pint) orange blossom water
400ml (14fl oz) unsweetened evaporated milk
finely grated rind of 2 oranges
ingredients.original:
200g (7oz) pistachio nut slivers, plus extra to decorate
150g (5½oz) caster sugar
600ml (20fl oz) full-fat milk
600ml (20fl oz) double cream
3 tbsp clear honey
200ml (1/3 pint) orange blossom water
400ml (14fl oz) unsweetened evaporated milk
finely grated rind of 2 oranges

ingredients.item: Blitz 150g (5½oz) of the pistachios along with the sugar in a food processor until finely ground.
ingredients.original: Blitz 150g (5½oz) of the pistachios along with the sugar in a food processor until finely ground.
